{{Quote|At the time of his arrest on Elrood, Kamiel had the death penalty in 54 systems. Each of these 54 systems desired to have Kamiel transported to their own capital for execution. After several weeks of arbitrating a settlement, Moff Gandril finally ordered the execution to take place on Haldeen itself.|A news report by Colonial News Nets|<ref name="GNN" />}}
'''Haldeen''' was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CSWE Gandril" /> located in the [[Haldeen system/Legends|Haldeen system]] of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies']] [[Haldeen sector/Legends|Haldeen sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was one of the [[Sector/Legends|sector's]] primary worlds.<ref name="CSWE Haldeen">{{CSWECite|II|8|Haldeen}}</ref> When [[Earnst Kamiel]], the leader of the [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorist]] organization the [[Justice Action Network]], was captured on<ref name="GNN6">{{JournalCite|6|Galaxywide NewsNets}}</ref> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]<ref name="EAOC Elrood">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Elrood system/Legends|Elrood system]]</ref> planet<ref name="Planets">''[[The Star Wars Planets Collection]]''</ref> [[Elrood/Legends|Elrood]]<ref name="GNN6" /> by [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="1 ABY">According to {{JournalCite|6|Galaxywide NewsNets}}, [[Earnst Kamiel]] was captured on [[Elrood/Legends|Elrood]] at some point by the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] "36:5:23," which corresponds to [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] per the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> he<ref name="GNN6" /> was extradited to Haldeen,<ref name="CSWE Haldeen" /> where he was sentenced to [[Death/Legends|death]] by a court of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="GNN" />

Kamiel's execution, however, saw a two-[[Standard month/Legends|month]] delay as each of the fifty-four [[Star system/Legends|star systems]] in which he had been given the death penalty wished to have him transported to their [[Capital/Legends|capital]] for the carrying out of the sentence. Ultimately, Imperial [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Gandril]] ordered the execution to take place on Haldeen itself. Kamiel was shot by a firing [[Squad/Legends|squad]] on the [[Local day/Legends|morning]] of the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] 36:10:4, and on the following day, [[Colonial News Nets]] issued a news report from [[Camele]], Haldeen informing about the event.<ref name="GNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
Haldeen was created by [[Paul Sudlow]] and first mentioned in the "[[Galaxywide NewsNets]]" feature of the [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 8|eighth issue]] of [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'', which was published in [[November]] [[1995]].<ref name="GNN" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Haldeen system, and therefore the planet, in grid square M-9.<ref name="TEA" />
